Item.name: Cov ntaub ntawv tsis ntev los no
Luam rau Daim Ntawv Teev Npe
Style Txhua Yam tshwm sim ntawm Token
Saib cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no hauv
Tsiv/Clone Cov Ntaub Ntawv Tam Sim No
Kaw tag nrho TAB SIS Cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no
Kaw tag nrho TAB SIS Pinned Cov ntaub ntawv
Kaw tag nrho rau sab laug
Restore Cov ntaub ntawv kaw tsis ntev los no
Qhib Folder li Chaw Ua Haujlwm...
Pib/End Xaiv nyob rau hauv kab hom
Txav Mus Los Tam Sim No
Txav mus rau kab tam sim no
Xaiv Kab Hauv Thaj Chaw Ascending
Xaiv Kab Hauv Qhov Chaw Txiav Txim Siab
Cais Kab Raws Li Integers Ascending
Cais Kab Raws Li Integers Descending
Hla tam sim no Mus rau Tom ntej Multi-xaiv
Trim ob qho tib si EOL rau Chaw
Txuag Tam Sim No Sau Macro...
Nyeem-Tsuas ntawm Cov Ntaub Ntawv Tam Sim No
Nyeem-Tsuas rau Txhua Cov Ntaub Ntawv
Clear Read-Tsuas rau Txhua Cov Ntaub Ntawv
Luam cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no
Copy tam sim no Dir.Txoj Kev
Luam tag nrho Cov Ntaub Ntawv Txoj Kev
Tshem Tawm Kab Ntsig (muaj cov cim tsis muaj)
Ntxig Kab Npauj Npaim Saum Ntuj Ceeb Tsheej
Ntxig kab kab hauv qab tam sim no
Muab tshuaj txhuam rau (Hloov) Bookmarked Kab
Xaiv Txhua Hauv-nruab nrab ntawm {} [] lossis ()
Mus rau yav dhau los Hloov
Xaiv thiab Nrhiav Yav dhau los
Qhia Cov Cim Tsis Sau Ntawv
Qhia Tswj Cov Cim Unicode EOL
Tsom ntsoov rau Lwm Tus Saib
Txav mus rau Qhov Chaw Tshiab
Notepad ++ Tus Neeg Siv Lus Txhais Cov Lus Sau
Hais Hais Kab Lus Sib Tham...
Tsim los ntawm cov ntaub ntawv...
Tsim los ntawm kev xaiv rau hauv daim ntawv teev npe
Tsim los ntawm cov ntaub ntawv...
Tsim los ntawm kev xaiv rau hauv daim ntawv teev npe
Tsim los ntawm cov ntaub ntawv...
Tsim los ntawm kev xaiv rau hauv daim ntawv teev npe
Tsim los ntawm cov ntaub ntawv...
Tsim los ntawm kev xaiv rau hauv daim ntawv teev npe
Qhib Txhua Cov Ntaub Ntawv Tsis ntev los no
Hloov Kho Lub Sij Hawm Ntxov
Kaw tag nrho rau sab laug
Qhib Muaj Folder li Chaw Ua Haujlwm
Luam rau Daim Ntawv Teev Npe

Txav mus rau Qhov Chaw Tshiab
Muab tag nrho lo lus xwb
Purge rau txhua qhov kev tshawb nrhiav
Hloov Txhua yam hauv Txhua Cov Ntaub Ntawv Qhib
Nrhiav Tag Nrho Hauv Txhua Cov Ntaub Ntawv Qhib
Nyob rau hauv tag nrho cov sub-folders
Nrhiav Txhua yam hauv Cov Ntaub Ntawv Tam Sim No

Koj mus tsis tau ntxiv li:

Kho txhua kab ua ib txoj hlua cais
Luam rau Daim Ntawv Teev Npe
Tus neeg siv-txhais lo lus tseem ceeb
Force foreground xim rau txhua yam
Force tom qab xim rau txhua yam
Force font xaiv rau txhua tus qauv
Force font loj xaiv rau txhua tus qauv
Force bold xaiv rau txhua yam
Force italic xaiv rau txhua yam
Force underline xaiv rau txhua yam
Ntiaj teb no override yog dab tsi?

ConflictInfoOk.name: Tsis muaj shortcut tsis sib haum xeeb rau cov khoom no.

Item.name: Qhib cov ntawv tais ceev tseg hauv Command Prompt
Restore Cov ntaub ntawv kaw tsis ntev los no
Tom ntej no tsab xov xwm3rd style
Next style of Nrhiav Mark style
Copy Styled Text of All Styles
Copy Styled Text of Nrhiav Mark style
Saib cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no hauv Firefox
Saib cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no hauv Chrome
Saib cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no hauv IE
Saib cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no hauv Ntug
Hloov mus rau cov ntaub ntawv dhau los
Hloov mus rau daim ntawv tom ntej
Toggle Project Vaj Huam Sib Luag 1
Toggle Project Vaj Huam Sib Luag 2
Toggle Project Vaj Huam Sib Luag 3
Toggle Folder li Chaw Ua Haujlwm
Hloov mus rau Vaj Huam Sib Luag 1
Hloov mus rau Vaj Huam Sib Luag 2
Hloov mus rau Vaj Huam Sib Luag 3
Hloov mus rau Folder li Chaw Ua Haujlwm
Hloov mus rau Daim Ntawv Teev Npe
Hloov mus rau Cov Npe Ua Haujlwm
Xaiv los ntawm lub npe A rau Z
Sort by Path A to Z
Sort by Path Z to A
Ntaus los ntawm Hom A rau Z
Ntaus los ntawm Hom Z rau A
Sau los ntawm Cov Ntsiab Lus Ntev Ascending
Ntaus los ntawm Cov Ntsiab Lus Nthuav Tawm
Qhov no yuav tshem tawm shortcut ntawm no hais kom ua
Tus neeg siv txhais lus hauv online pab
Folding hauv code 2 style (separators xav tau)
Cia qhov chaw dawb ua ntej

Operator.title: Tus neeg khiav dej num Delimiter

Item.name: Nkaum (siv Alt lossis F10 yuam sij rau toggle)
Kos ib lub xim xim rau ntawm lub tab tab
Qhia cov nyees khawm ntawm cov tabs tsis ua haujlwm
Ob npaug nias rau kaw cov ntaub ntawv
Tawm ntawm kaw lub xeem tab
Ua kom theem tam sim no folding/unfolding commands toggleable
Disable advanced scrolling feature vim qhov teeb meem touchpad
Pab kom scrolling dhau kab kawg
Khaws kev xaiv thaum txoj cai-nias sab nraud ntawm kev xaiv
Siv cov xim kev cai rau cov ntawv xaiv rau pem hauv ntej
Qhov taw qhia kab tam sim no
Pab kom xaiv kab rau Multi-Editing
Siv Cov Kev Pom Zoo rau C0, C1 Unicode EOL
Tiv thaiv tus cwj pwm tswj (C0 code) ntaus ntawv rau hauv daim ntawv
Thov qhib ANSI cov ntaub ntawv
Ib txwm qhib ib daim ntawv tshiab ntxiv thaum pib
Siv thawj kab ntawm cov ntaub ntawv uas tsis muaj npe tab npe
Ua raws li cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no
Qhib tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv ntawm nplaub tshev es tsis txhob launching Folder li Workspace ntawm nplaub tshev poob
Thov tawm Notepad ++ thiab rov qhib Notepad ++ hauv Administrator hom siv cov yam ntxwv no.
Ua cov ntawv qhia zaub mov compact
Kho backslash li khiav tawm ua cim rau SQL
Backspace tseem ceeb unindents es tsis txhob tshem ib qho chaw
Style Txhua Yam tshwm sim ntawm Token
Muab tag nrho lo lus xwb
Muab tag nrho lo lus xwb

Element.name: Tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv npe path

Item.name: Ntawm no tso saib koj qhov chaw sib txawv
Siv monospaced font hauv Nrhiav dialog (Xav tau rov pib Notepad ++)
Nrhiav dialog tseem qhib tom qab kev tshawb nrhiav uas tso tawm rau lub qhov rais tshwm sim
Paub hloov pauv txhua yam hauv txhua cov ntaub ntawv qhib
Hloov: Tsis txhob txav mus rau qhov tshwm sim hauv qab no
Tshawb nrhiav qhov rai: pom tsuas yog ib qho nkag rau ib kab pom yog tias ua tau
Sau Nrhiav teb nrog cov ntawv xaiv
Xaiv Lo Lus Hauv Cuam Tshuam Thaum Tsis Muaj Dab Tsi Xaiv
Yam tsawg kawg nkaus rau kev kuaj xyuas "hauv kev xaiv":
Sau Nrhiav hauv Cov Ntaub Ntawv Phau Ntawv Qhia Raws Li Cov Ntaub Ntawv Ua Haujlwm
: Max Cim rau Nws Pib-Fill Nrhiav Field los ntawm Kev Xaiv

RecentFilesHistory.title: Cov ntaub ntawv tsis ntev los no

Item.name: Cov ntaub ntawv tsis ntev los no
Tsis txhob tshawb xyuas lub sijhawm tso tawm
Qhib kev sib tham snapshot thiab ncua sij hawm thaub qab
Ua rau thaub qab ntawm kev hloov kho hauv txhua qhov
Nco ntsoov qhov kev sib tham tam sim no rau kev tshaj tawm tom ntej
Nco ntsoov cov ntaub ntawv nkag tsis tau los ntawm kev sib tham dhau los
Pab kom nws pib ua tiav ntawm txhua qhov kev tawm tswv yim
Muaj nuj nqi thiab lo lus tiav
Ua kom tiav daim ntawv teev npe luv luv
Function parameters hint rau cov tswv yim
Qhib kev sib tham hauv ib qho piv txwv tshiab (thiab txuag kev sib kho cia li tawm ntawm kev tawm)
Ib txwm nyob hauv ntau hom qauv
* Kev hloov kho ntawm qhov teeb tsa no yuav tsum rov pib Notepad ++
Rov qab default date time orders (short long formats)
Vaj Huam Sib Luag Lub Xeev thiab [-nosession] *
Nco ntsoov lub xeev lub vaj huam sib luag (lub vaj huam sib luag qhib) hauv lwm qhov xwm txheej (ntau hom piv txwv) lossis thaum siv cov kab lus hais kom ua [-nosession]
Delimiter xaiv chaw (Ctrl + Nas ob npaug nias)
Siv default Word cim npe raws li nws yog
Ntxiv koj tus cwj pwm ua ib feem ntawm lo lus (tsis txhob xaiv nws tshwj tsis yog koj paub tias koj ua dab tsi)
Pab Txhawb Cov Ntaub Ntawv Loj Loj (tsis muaj syntax highlighting)
Deactivate Word Wrap thoob ntiaj teb
Ncua lus ceeb toom thaum qhib ≥2GB cov ntaub ntawv
Teem koj huab qhov chaw txoj kev ntawm no:
Search Engine (rau hais kom ua "Tshawb hauv Internet")
Teem koj lub cav tshawb nrhiav ntawm no:

Element.name: Pab kom cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no
Qhib rau txhua cov ntaub ntawv qhib

Item.name: Scroll mus rau kab kawg tom qab hloov tshiab
Qhia tsuas yog filename hauv lub npe bar
Saib ntawm daim duab qhia chaw
Pab Kom Txuag Tag Nrho Kev Pom Zoo dialog
Khiav kom txog thaum kawg ntawm cov ntaub ntawv
Tshawb nrhiav hauv cov kab pom xwb
Muab tag nrho lo lus xwb

DoSaveAll.title: Txuag Txhua Qhov Kev Pom Zoo

Item.name:
Koj puas paub tseeb tias koj xav khaws tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv hloov kho?
Xaiv "Ib txwm yog" yog tias koj tsis xav pom qhov kev sib tham no dua. Koj tuaj yeem rov qhib qhov kev sib tham no hauv Preferences tom qab.
Luam cov ntaub ntawv debug rau cov ntawv teev cia
Kaw lub vaj huam sib luag
Tsis muaj git repository\nSiv Browse los qhib repo.
Xauj rau qhov chaw khaws cia\u2026
Nrhiav cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no
Cov ntaub ntawv kev sib tham xaiv tsis muaj tabs.
Clear Cov ntaub ntawv tsis ntev los no
Sau tus macro thawj zaug siv Start Recording.
Tsis muaj shortcut tsis sib haum xeeb.
Qhia tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv txoj hauv kab npe
Pab kom nws pib thaub qab
Tsis muaj shortcut tsis sib haum xeeb rau cov khoom no.
Rov pib dua daim ntawv thov kom thauj cov plugins ntsia.
Tsis Muaj Peev Xwm Saib Xyuas Kev Hloov Kho
Tshem tawm cov plugins hauv qab no?
Nruab cov plugins hauv qab no?
Qhov no yuav rho tawm cov ntaub ntawv plugin.
Sau thiab txuag lub macro ua ntej.
Hais kom ua lub npe rau Run menu
Tag nrho cov cim tau raug tshem tawm.
Cov ntawv cim tau theej rau hauv daim ntawv teev cia.
Tsis muaj ntawv cim rau luam.
Hloov hauv Cov Haujlwm: Tseem tsis tau txuas nrog.
Nrhiav hauv Cov Haujlwm: Tseem tsis tau txuas nrog Project Vaj Huam Sib Luag daim ntawv teev npe.
Qhov chaw ua haujlwm tau hloov kho.
Koj puas xav khaws cov kev hloov pauv?
Smart highlighting: tag lo lus xwb
Ob npaug nias rau kaw tab
Nco ntsoov lub vaj huam sib luag pom kev hla ntu
Khaws cov ntawv tsis tuaj yeem nkag rau hauv kev sib kho
Paub meej ua ntej Txuag Tag Nrho
Paub meej Hloov Txhua yam hauv cov ntaub ntawv qhib
Hloov: tsis txhob txav mus rau qhov tshwm sim tom ntej
Siv monospaced font hauv Nrhiav dialog
Siv XML-raws li muaj nuj nqi npe parsers
Xaiv ib Notepad++ ntsiab XML cov ntaub ntawv thov
hauv tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv
Cov nqi ntau yuav tsum yog 0-255 thiab pib yuav tsum yog <= kawg.
Rov pib Notepad ++ kom rov tsim dua qhov default contextMenu.xml.
Cov ntaub ntawv muaj kev hloov pauv tsis tau khaws tseg.Reloading nrog tus tshiab encoding yuav muab pov tseg.Txuas ntxiv?
Tsis muaj lus teb los ntawm server.
Neeg rau zaub mov xa rov qab cov xwm txheej
Lub chaw cia khoom yuav yog tus kheej.
Cov ntaub ntawv lus ntxiv (.xml) tuaj yeem muab tso rau hauv:
Hla tam sim no amp;Mus rau Next Multi-xaiv

ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.title: Editing contextMenu
ContextMenuXmlEditWarning.message: Kho cov ntsiab lus contextMenu.xml tso cai rau koj hloov kho koj Notepad ++ popup cov ntsiab lus ntawv qhia zaub mov. Koj yuav tsum rov pib dua koj Notepad ++ kom muaj txiaj ntsig tom qab hloov contextMenu.xml.

SaveCurrentModifWarning.title: Txuag Tam Sim No Hloov Kho
SaveCurrentModifWarning.message:
Koj yuav tsum txuag qhov kev hloov kho tam sim no. Txhua qhov kev hloov kho uas tau khaws tseg tsis tuaj yeem thim rov qab.
Txuas ntxiv?

LoseUndoAbilityWarning.title: Poob Undo Muaj peev xwm ceeb toom
LoseUndoAbilityWarning.message:
Koj yuav tsum txuag qhov kev hloov kho tam sim no. Txhua qhov kev hloov kho uas tau khaws tseg tsis tuaj yeem thim rov qab.
Txuas ntxiv?

CannotMoveDoc.title: Txav mus rau Notepad ++ tshiab
CannotMoveDoc.message: Cov ntaub ntawv raug hloov kho, txuag nws thiab rov sim dua.

DocReloadWarning.title: Reload
DocReloadWarning.message: Koj puas paub tseeb tias koj xav rov rub tawm cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no thiab poob cov kev hloov pauv hauv Notepad ++?

FileLockedWarning.title: Txuag tsis tau
FileLockedWarning.message: Thov xyuas seb puas yog cov ntaub ntawv no qhib rau lwm qhov kev pab cuam

FileAlreadyOpenedInNpp.message: Cov ntaub ntawv twb qhib lawm hauv Notepad ++.

RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.title: Hloov npe tsis tau
RenameTabTemporaryNameAlreadyInUse.message: Lub npe teev npe twb tau siv rau ntawm lwm lub tab.

RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.title: Hloov npe tsis tau
RenameTabTemporaryNameIsEmpty.message: Lub npe teev tsis tuaj yeem khoob, lossis nws tsis tuaj yeem muaj qhov chaw xwb lossis TAB(s).

DeleteFileFailed.title: Rho tawm cov ntaub ntawv
DeleteFileFailed.message: Rho tawm cov ntaub ntawv ua tsis tau tejyam

NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.title: Cov ntaub ntawv qhib ntau dhau
NbFileToOpenImportantWarning.message: $INT_REPLACE$ files are about to be opened. Are you sure you want to open them?

SettingsOnCloudError.title: Kev teeb tsa ntawm Cloud
SettingsOnCloudError.message: Nws zoo li txoj hauv kev ntawm kev teeb tsa ntawm huab tau teeb tsa ntawm kev nyeem ntawv nkaus xwb, los yog ntawm ib daim nplaub tshev xav tau txoj cai rau kev sau ntawv. Koj qhov chaw nyob hauv huab yuav raug muab tso tseg.Thov rov pib dua tus nqi sib txuam ntawm Preference dialog.

FilePathNotFoundWarning.title: Cov ntaub ntawv Qhib
FilePathNotFoundWarning.message: Cov ntaub ntawv koj tab tom sim qhib tsis muaj nyob.

SessionFileInvalidError.title: Tsis Tau Load Session
SessionFileInvalidError.message: Session file yog corrupted los yog tsis siv tau.

DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.title: Invalid action
DroppingFolderAsProjectModeWarning.message: Koj tuaj yeem tso cov ntaub ntawv lossis cov folders nkaus xwb tab sis tsis yog ob qho tib si, vim tias koj nyob hauv kev poob Folder li Project hom. Koj yuav tsum ua kom "Qhib tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv ntawm cov ntawv tais ceev tseg es tsis txhob tso tawm Folder li Chaw Ua Haujlwm ntawm daim nplaub tshev poob" hauv "Default Directory" ntu ntawm Kev Nyiam dialog los ua qhov haujlwm no.

SortingError.title: Soj ntsuam yuam kev
SortingError.message: Tsis tuaj yeem ua tus lej txheeb xyuas vim kab $INT_REPLACE$.

SortLocaleMultiple.title: Tsis ua cas
SortLocaleMultiple.message: Kev xaiv ntau yam tsis txaus siab.

SortLocaleUnknown.title: Xaiv Tsis Tau
SortLocaleUnknown.message: Qhov laj thawj qhov kev ua tsis tiav tsis tuaj yeem txiav txim siab.

ColumnModeTip.title: Kum Hom Tswv Yim
ColumnModeTip.message:
Muaj 3 txoj hauv kev los hloov mus rau kab-xaiv hom:
1. (Keyboard thiab nas) Tuav Alt thaum laug-nias luag
2. (Keyboard nkaus xwb) Tuav Alt+Shift thaum siv cov yuam sij xub xub
3. (Keyboard lossis nas) Muab cart ntawm qhov xav tau pib ntawm kab thaiv txoj haujlwm, tom qab ntawd ua "Begin/End Select in Column Mode" hais kom ua; Txav mus rau qhov xav tau kawg ntawm kab thaiv txoj haujlwm, tom qab ntawd ua "Begin/End Select in Kum Mode" hais kom ua dua

BufferInvalidWarning.title: Txuag tsis tau
BufferInvalidWarning.message: Txuag tsis tau: Buffer tsis raug.

DoCloseOrNot.title: Khaws cov ntaub ntawv uas twb muaj lawm
DoCloseOrNot.message: Cov ntaub ntawv "$STR_REPLACE$" tsis muaj lawm. Khaws cov ntaub ntawv no hauv editor?

DoDeleteOrNot.title: Rho tawm cov ntaub ntawv
DoDeleteOrNot.message: Cov ntaub ntawv "$STR_REPLACE$" yuav raug xa mus rau koj lub Recycle Bin thiab daim ntawv no yuav raug kaw. Txuas ntxiv?

NoBackupDoSaveFile.title: Txuag
NoBackupDoSaveFile.message: Koj tsis tuaj yeem pom koj cov ntaub ntawv thaub qab (tshem tawm sab nraud). Txuag nws txwv tsis pub koj cov ntaub ntawv yuav ploj Koj puas xav khaws cov ntaub ntawv "$STR_REPLACE$"?

DoReloadOrNot.title: Reload
DoReloadOrNot.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Cov ntaub ntawv no tau raug hloov kho los ntawm lwm qhov kev pab cuam. Koj puas xav reload nws?

DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.title: Reload
DoReloadOrNotAndLooseChange.message:
"$STR_REPLACE$"
Cov ntaub ntawv no tau raug hloov kho los ntawm lwm qhov kev pab cuam. Koj puas xav rov thauj nws thiab poob cov kev hloov pauv hauv Notepad ++?

PrehistoricSystemDetected.title: Prehistoric system kuaj pom
PrehistoricSystemDetected.message: Nws zoo nkaus li koj tseem siv lub prehistoric system.Qhov no feature ua hauj lwm tsuas yog nyob rau hauv ib tug niaj hnub system, thov txim.

XpUpdaterProblem.title: Notepad++ Updater
XpUpdaterProblem.message: Notepad ++ updater tsis sib xws nrog XP vim yog txheej txheem kev ruaj ntseg uas tsis siv nyob rau hauv XP. Koj puas xav mus rau nplooj ntawv Notepad ++ txhawm rau rub tawm qhov tseeb version?

GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.title: Chaw Pov Thawj
GUpProxyConfNeedAdminMode.message: Thov rov qhib Notepad ++ hauv Admin hom kom teeb tsa npe.

DocTooDirtyToMonitor.title: Saib xyuas teeb meem
DocTooDirtyToMonitor.message: Cov ntaub ntawv yog qias neeg.Thov txuag qhov kev hloov kho ua ntej saib xyuas nws.

DocNoExistToMonitor.title: Saib xyuas teeb meem
DocNoExistToMonitor.message: Cov ntaub ntawv yuav tsum muaj nyob kom saib xyuas.

FileTooBigToOpen.title: Cov ntaub ntawv loj teeb meem
FileTooBigToOpen.message: Cov ntaub ntawv loj dhau los qhib los ntawm Notepad ++

FileLoadingException.title: Exception code: $STR_REPLACE$
FileLoadingException.message: Ib qho yuam kev tshwm sim thaum thauj cov ntaub ntawv!

WantToOpenHugeFile.title: Qhib cov ntaub ntawv loj loj ceeb toom
WantToOpenHugeFile.message: Qhib cov ntaub ntawv loj ntawm 2GB + tuaj yeem siv sijhawm ob peb feeb. Koj puas xav qhib nws?

CreateNewFileError.title: Tsim cov ntaub ntawv tshiab
CreateNewFileError.message: Tsim tsis tau cov ntaub ntawv "$STR_REPLACE$".

OpenFileError.title: UA TSAUG
OpenFileError.message: Tsis tuaj yeem qhib cov ntaub ntawv "$STR_REPLACE$".

OpenFileNoFolderError.title: Qhib tsis tau ntaub ntawv
OpenFileNoFolderError.message: "$STR_REPLACE1$" qhib tsis tau: Folder "$STR_REPLACE2$" tsis muaj nyob.

FileBackupFailed.title: Cov ntaub ntawv thaub qab tsis tau
FileBackupFailed.message:
Cov ntawv dhau los ntawm cov ntaub ntawv tsis tuaj yeem khaws cia rau hauv phau ntawv thaub qab ntawm "$STR_REPLACE$".
Koj puas xav khaws cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no lawm?

LoadStylersFailed.title: Load stylers.xml ua tsis tau tejyam

LoadLangsFailed.title: Configurator
LoadLangsFailed.message: Load langs.xml ua tsis tau! Koj puas xav rov qab koj langs.xml?

FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.title: Folder li Workspace ntxiv cov teeb meem folder
FolderAsWorspaceSubfolderExists.message: Ib sub-folder ntawm cov ntawv tais ceev tseg koj xav ntxiv muaj. Thov tshem nws cov hauv paus ntawm lub vaj huam sib luag ua ntej koj ntxiv nplaub tshev "$STR_REPLACE$".

ProjectPanelChanged.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelChanged.message: Qhov chaw ua haujlwm tau hloov kho.Koj puas xav txuag nws?

ProjectPanelSaveError.title: $STR_REPLACE$
ProjectPanelSaveError.message: Ib qho yuam kev tshwm sim thaum sau koj cov ntaub ntawv chaw ua haujlwm. Koj qhov chaw ua haujlwm tsis tau txais kev cawmdim.

ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Qhib Chaw Ua Haujlwm
ProjectPanelOpenDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Qhov chaw ua haujlwm tam sim no tau hloov kho.Koj puas xav txuag qhov project tam sim no?

ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.title: Chaw Ua Haujlwm Tshiab
ProjectPanelNewDoSaveDirtyWsOrNot.message: Qhov chaw ua haujlwm tam sim no tau hloov kho.Koj puas xav txuag qhov project tam sim no?

ProjectPanelOpenFailed.title: Qhib Chaw Ua Haujlwm
ProjectPanelOpenFailed.message: Lub chaw ua haujlwm tsis tuaj yeem qhib. Nws zoo li cov ntaub ntawv qhib tsis yog cov ntaub ntawv siv tau.

ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.title: Tshem tawm cov ntawv tais ceev tseg ntawm qhov project
ProjectPanelRemoveFolderFromProject.message: Tag nrho cov sub-khoom yuav raug tshem tawm. Koj puas paub tseeb tias koj xav tshem tawm cov ntawv tais ceev tseg ntawm qhov project?

ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.title: Tshem tawm cov ntaub ntawv los ntawm qhov project
ProjectPanelRemoveFileFromProject.message: Koj puas paub tseeb tias koj xav tshem tawm cov ntaub ntawv no los ntawm qhov project?

ProjectPanelReloadError.title: Reload Workspace
ProjectPanelReloadError.message: Nrhiav tsis tau cov ntaub ntawv rov qab.

ProjectPanelReloadDirty.title: Reload Workspace
ProjectPanelReloadDirty.message: Qhov chaw ua haujlwm tam sim no tau hloov kho.Reloading yuav muab pov tseg tag nrho cov kev hloov kho. Koj puas xav mus ntxiv?

UDLNewNameError.title: UDL yuam kev
UDLNewNameError.message: Lub npe no yog siv los ntawm lwm hom lus, thov muab rau lwm tus.

UDLRemoveCurrentLang.title: Tshem tawm cov lus tam sim no

UDL_saveBeforeImport.title: Neeg txhais lus
UDL_saveBeforeImport.message: Ua ntej xa tawm, txuag koj cov lus txhais los ntawm nias "Txuag li ..." khawm.

UDL_exportFails.title: Neeg txhais lus
UDL_exportFails.message: Ua tsis tiav rau kev xa tawm.

SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.title: Koj puas paub tseeb?
SCMapperDoDeleteOrNot.message: Koj puas paub tseeb tias koj xav rho tawm qhov shortcut?

FindCharRangeValueError.title: Range Value teeb meem
FindCharRangeValueError.message: Koj yuav tsum ntaus ntawm 0 thiab 255.

OpenInAdminMode.title: Txuag tsis tau
OpenInAdminMode.message: Cov ntaub ntawv tsis tuaj yeem raug cawm thiab nws yuav raug tiv thaiv. Koj puas xav tso Notepad ++ hauv Administrator hom?

OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.title: Txuag tsis tau
OpenInAdminModeWithoutCloseCurrent.message: Cov ntaub ntawv tsis tuaj yeem raug cawm thiab nws yuav raug tiv thaiv. Koj puas xav tso Notepad ++ hauv Administrator hom?

OpenInAdminModeFailed.title: Qhib hauv Administrator hom ua tsis tau tejyam
OpenInAdminModeFailed.message: Notepad ++ tsis tuaj yeem qhib hauv Administrator hom.

ViewInBrowser.title: Saib cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no hauv Browser
ViewInBrowser.message: Daim ntawv thov tsis tuaj yeem pom hauv koj qhov system.

ExitToUpdatePlugins.title: Notepad++ tab tom yuav tawm
ExitToUpdatePlugins.message: Yog tias koj nyem YOG, koj yuav tawm ntawm Notepad ++ txhawm rau ua haujlwm txuas ntxiv. Notepad ++ yuav rov pib dua tom qab tag nrho cov haujlwm raug kaw. Txuas ntxiv?

NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.title: Notepad++ yuav tsum tau rov pib dua
NeedToRestartToLoadPlugins.message: Koj yuav tsum rov pib Notepad ++ kom thauj cov plugins uas koj tau teeb tsa.

ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.title: Notepad++ yuav tsum tau rov pib dua
ChangeHistoryEnabledWarning.message: Koj yuav tsum rov pib Notepad ++ kom pab Hloov Keeb Kwm.

WindowsSessionExit.title: Notepad++ - Qhov kev sib kho Windows tawm
WindowsSessionExit.message: Windows kev sib kho yuav raug txiav tawm tab sis koj muaj qee cov ntaub ntawv tsis tau khaws cia.Koj puas xav tawm Notepad ++ tam sim no?

LanguageMenuCompactWarning.title: Compact Language Menu
LanguageMenuCompactWarning.message: Qhov kev xaiv no yuav raug hloov ntawm lub community launch tom ntej.

SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.title: $STR_REPLACE$
SwitchUnsavedThemeWarning.message: Cov kev hloov pauv uas tsis tau khaws tseg tab tom yuav muab pov tseg! Koj puas xav txuag koj cov kev hloov pauv ua ntej hloov cov ntsiab lus?

MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.title: Macro thiab Khiav Commands Compatibility
MacroAndRunCmdlWarning.message:
Koj cov Macro thiab Khiav cov lus txib tau khaws tseg hauv Notepad ++ v.8.5.2 (lossis laus dua) yuav tsis sib haum nrog Notepad ++ tam sim no. Thov sim cov lus txib thiab, yog tias xav tau, rov kho lawv.
Xwb, koj tuaj yeem downgrade rau Notepad ++ v8.5.2 thiab rov kho koj cov ntaub ntawv dhau los. Notepad ++ yuav backup koj qub "shortcuts.xml" thiab txuag nws li "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup". Renaming "shortcuts.xml.v8.5.2.backup" -> "shortcuts.xml", koj cov lus txib yuav tsum rov qab los thiab ua haujlwm zoo.

FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.title: Txuag tsis tau
FullReadOnlySavingForbidden.message: Khaws tsis tau ntaub ntawv. Lub Notepad ++ tag nrho nyeem-tsuas yog txuag hom txwv txwv tsis pub cov ntaub ntawv khaws tseg.

NotEnoughRoom4Saving.title: Txuag tsis tau
NotEnoughRoom4Saving.message: Ua tsis tiav cov ntaub ntawv. Nws zoo nkaus li tsis muaj chaw txaus ntawm disk los khaws cov ntaub ntawv.Koj cov ntaub ntawv tsis raug cawm.

FileInaccessibleUserSession.title: Cov ntaub ntawv nkag tsis tau
FileInaccessibleUserSession.message:
Qee cov ntaub ntawv los ntawm koj qhov kev khaws cia "$STR_REPLACE$" yog siv tsis tau.Lawv tuaj yeem qhib raws li cov ntaub ntawv khoob thiab nyeem nkaus xwb raws li qhov chaw.
Koj puas xav tsim cov placeholder?
CEEB TOOM: Xaiv tsis tsim cov chaw tuav lossis kaw lawv tom qab, koj qhov kev khaws cia yuav tsis raug hloov kho thaum tawm mus.

FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.title: Cov ntaub ntawv nkag tsis tau
FileInaccessibleDefaultSessionXml.message:
Qee cov ntaub ntawv los ntawm koj qhov kev sib tham yav dhau los yog siv tsis tau.Lawv tuaj yeem qhib raws li cov ntaub ntawv khoob thiab nyeem nkaus xwb raws li qhov chaw.
Koj puas xav tsim cov placeholder?
CEEB TOOM: Xaiv tsis tsim cov chaw tuav lossis kaw lawv tom qab, koj qhov kev sib kho yuav raug hloov kho ntawm EXIT!Peb xav kom koj backup koj "session.xml" tam sim no.

RTLvsDirectWrite.title: Tsis tuaj yeem khiav RTL
RTLvsDirectWrite.message: RTL tsis sib xws nrog DirectWrite hom.Thov lov tes taw DirectWrite hom hauv MISC.ntu ntawm Preferences dialog, thiab pib dua Notepad ++.

FileMemoryAllocationFailed.title: Kev zam: Cov ntaub ntawv nco faib ua tsis tiav
FileMemoryAllocationFailed.message: Muaj tej zaum tsis txaus sib txuas dawb nco rau cov ntaub ntawv raug loaded los ntawm Notepad ++.

FindRegexBackwardDisabled.title: Regex rov qab nrhiav neeg xiam
FindRegexBackwardDisabled.message:
Los ntawm lub neej ntawd, kev tshawb nrhiav regex rov qab raug kaw vim muaj qhov tshwm sim tsis tau xav txog.Txhawm rau ua qhov kev tshawb nrhiav rov qab, qhib qhov Nrhiav dialog thiab xaiv hom kev tshawb nrhiav ib txwm lossis txuas ntxiv es tsis txhob hais tawm. Nias lub OK khawm kom qhib qhov Nrhiav dialog lossis teeb tsom rau nws.
Yog tias koj xav tau qhov rov qab regex searching feature, sab laj tus neeg siv phau ntawv rau cov lus qhia ntawm kev qhib nws.

PrintError.message: Tsis tuaj yeem pib daim ntawv tshuab luam ntawv.

FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.title: Nrhiav ceeb toom
FindAutoChangeOfInSelectionWarning.message: Lub xeev "Nyob rau hauv xaiv" checkbox tau raug hloov kho. Thov txheeb xyuas qhov kev tshawb nrhiav ua ntej ua qhov kev txiav txim.

Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.title: Notepad++ yuav tsum tau rov pib dua
Need2Restart2ShowMenuShortcuts.message: Notepad ++ yuav tsum tau rov pib dua kom pom txoj cai shortcuts.

NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.title: Hloov cov ntaub ntawv nyeem nkaus xwb tsis ua tiav
NoAdminRight2ChangeReadOnlyFileAttribute.message: Thov khiav Notepad ++ ua tus thawj coj los hloov cov ntaub ntawv cwj pwm.

PanelTitle.name: ASCII Codes Insertion Vaj Huam Sib Luag

PreferencesInitialSort.name: Xaiv cov haujlwm (A rau Z) los ntawm lub neej ntawd

SelectFolderFromBrowserString.name: Xaiv ib daim nplaub tshev ntxiv rau hauv Folder li Workspace vaj huam sib luag

LocateCurrentFileTip.name: Nrhiav cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no

Item.name: Ntxiv cov ntaub ntawv los ntawm Directory...
Ntxiv cov ntaub ntawv los ntawm Directory...
Hloov Cov Ntaub Ntawv Txoj Kev

word-chars-list-tip.value: Qhov no tso cai rau koj suav nrog cov cim ntxiv rau hauv cov cim tam sim no thaum nias ob npaug rau kev xaiv lossis tshawb nrog "Match tag nrho lo lus nkaus xwb" xaiv xaiv.

eol-custom-color-tip.value: Mus rau Style Configurator hloov lub neej ntawd EOL kev cai xim ("EOL kev cai xim")..

word-chars-list-warning-end.value: hauv koj daim ntawv teev npe.

backup-select-folder.value: Xaiv ib daim nplaub tshev raws li backup directory

cloud-restart-warning.value: Thov rov pib dua Notepad ++ kom siv tau.

cloud-select-folder.value: Xaiv ib lub nplaub tshev los ntawm / mus rau qhov twg Notepad ++ nyeem / sau nws cov chaw

default-open-save-select-folder.value: Xaiv ib daim nplaub tshev raws li default directory

shift-change-direction-tip.value: Siv Shift+Enter los tshawb nrhiav nyob rau hauv qhov kev coj rov qab

find-in-files-filter-tip.value:
Nrhiav hauv cpp, cxx, h, hxx hpp: *.cpp *.cxx *.h *.hxx *.hpp
Nrhiav hauv txhua cov ntaub ntawv tshwj tsis yog exe, obj log: *.* !*.exe !*.obj !*.log
Nrhiav hauv txhua cov ntaub ntawv tab sis tsis suav nrog cov ntawv xeem, hauv bin64: *.* !\tests !\bin*
Nrhiav nyob rau hauv tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv tab sis tsis suav tag nrho cov folders cav los yog cav recursively: *.* !+\log*

find-in-files-select-folder.value: Xaiv ib lub nplaub tshev los tshawb ntawm

find-in-files-dir-from-active-doc-tip.value: Sau Daim Ntawv Teev Npe raws li cov ntaub ntawv nquag

find-status-top-reached.value: Nrhiav: Tau txais cov ntaub ntawv pib, thawj zaug tshwm sim hauv qab pom.

find-status-end-reached.value: Nrhiav: ncav cuag cov ntaub ntawv kawg, thawj zaug tshwm sim los ntawm sab saum toj pom.

find-status-replaceinfiles-1-replaced.value: Hloov hauv Cov Ntaub Ntawv: 1 qhov tshwm sim raug hloov

find-status-replaceinfiles-nb-replaced.value: Hloov hauv Cov Ntaub Ntawv: $INT_REPLACE$ tshwm sim tau hloov

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-1-repla.value: Hloov hauv Cov Ntaub Ntawv Qhib: 1 qhov tshwm sim raug hloov

find-status-replaceinopenedfiles-nb-repl.value: Hloov hauv Opened Files: $INT_REPLACE$ tshwm sim tau hloov

find-status-invalid-re.value: Nrhiav: Cov lus qhia tsis raug cai

find-status-replaceall-1-replaced.value: Hloov tag nrho: 1 qhov tshwm sim tau hloov

find-status-replaceall-nb-replaced.value: Hloov Tag Nrho: $INT_REPLACE$ tshwm sim tau hloov

find-status-replaceall-readonly.value: Hloov Tag Nrho: Hloov tsis tau ntawv.Cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no tsuas yog nyeem

find-status-replace-end-reached.value: Hloov: ncav cuag cov ntaub ntawv kawg, pib los ntawm sab saum toj.

find-status-replace-top-reached.value: Hloov: Tau txais cov ntaub ntawv pib, pib los ntawm hauv qab.

find-status-replaced-next-found.value: Hloov: 1 qhov tshwm sim tau hloov.Qhov tshwm sim tom ntej pom.

find-status-replaced-without-continuing.value: Hloov: 1 qhov tshwm sim tau hloov.

find-status-replaced-next-not-found.value: Hloov: 1 qhov tshwm sim tau hloov.Tsis pom muaj tshwm sim ntxiv lawm.

find-status-replace-not-found.value: Hloov: tsis pom qhov tshwm sim

find-status-replace-readonly.value: Hloov: Hloov tsis tau ntawv.Cov ntaub ntawv tam sim no tsuas yog nyeem

find-status-cannot-find.value: Nrhiav: Nrhiav tsis tau cov ntawv "$STR_REPLACE$"

find-status-cannot-find-pebkac-maybe.value: Qhov tshwm sim tsis tuaj yeem pom.Tej zaum koj yuav tsis nco qab kos "Wrap around" (rau ON), "Match case" (rau OFF), lossis "Match tag nrho lo lus nkaus xwb" (rau OFF).

find-status-scope-all.value: hauv tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv

find-status-scope-forward.value: los ntawm caret mus rau qhov kawg ntawm cov ntaub ntawv

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat.value: Cov cim tsis pom hauv pasted "Nrhiav dab tsi" lossis "Hloov nrog" cov ntsiab lus

find-status-invisible-chars-findWhat-tip.value: Ceeb Toom: Cov cim tsis pom hauv kev tshawb nrhiav (lossis hloov) teb. Cov ntawv muab tso rau hauv daim teb no suav nrog pom tsis pom (tej zaum kab-kawg) cov cim.Yog tias koj txuas ntxiv yam tsis tau muab tshem tawm, lawv yuav suav nrog hauv kev tshawb nrhiav (lossis hloov) cov ntawv nyeem.

finder-find-in-finder.value: Nrhiav hauv cov kev tshawb fawb no...

finder-close-this.value: Kaw cov kev tshawb fawb no

finder-purge-for-every-search.value: Purge rau txhua qhov kev tshawb nrhiav

userdefined-title-save.value: Txuag Tam Sim No Lub Npe Ua...

userdefined-title-rename.value: Rename Tam Sim No Lub Npe

progress-cancel-info.value: Tso tseg txoj haujlwm, thov tos...

find-in-files-progress-title.value: Nrhiav hauv cov ntaub ntawv kev kawm...

replace-in-files-confirm-directory.value: Koj puas paub tseeb tias koj xav hloov txhua qhov tshwm sim hauv:

replace-in-files-progress-title.value: Hloov Hauv Cov Ntaub Ntawv Kev Txhim Kho...

replace-in-projects-confirm-message.value: Koj puas xav hloov txhua qhov tshwm sim hauv tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv hauv qhov Project Panel xaiv?

replace-in-open-docs-confirm-message.value: Koj puas paub tseeb tias koj xav hloov txhua qhov tshwm sim hauv txhua cov ntaub ntawv qhib?

find-result-title-info.value: ($INT_REPLACE1$ hits hauv $INT_REPLACE2$ cov ntaub ntawv ntawm $INT_REPLACE3$ tshawb)

find-result-title-info-extra.value: - Kab Lim Hom: tsuas yog tso saib cov txiaj ntsig lim

session-save-folder-as-workspace.value: Txuag Folder li Chaw Ua Haujlwm

IncrementalFind-FSTopReached.value: Mus txog sab saum toj ntawm nplooj ntawv, txuas ntxiv hauv qab

IncrementalFind-FSEndReached.value: Mus txog qhov kawg ntawm nplooj ntawv, txuas ntxiv los ntawm sab saum toj

contextMenu-styleAlloccurrencesOfToken.value: Style txhua qhov tshwm sim ntawm token

largeFileRestriction-tip.value:
Qee cov nta yuav ua haujlwm qeeb hauv cov ntaub ntawv loj.Cov yam ntxwv no tuaj yeem ua haujlwm tsis siv neeg thaum qhib cov ntaub ntawv loj.Koj tuaj yeem kho lawv ntawm no.
CEEB TOOM: 1. Hloov kho cov kev xaiv ntawm no yuav tsum tau rov qhib tam sim no qhib cov ntaub ntawv loj kom tau txais tus cwj pwm zoo.
2. Yog tias "Deactivate Word Wrap globally" raug kuaj xyuas thiab koj qhib cov ntaub ntawv loj, "Word Wrap" yuav raug xiam rau tag nrho cov ntaub ntawv.Koj tuaj yeem rov qhib nws ntawm cov ntawv qhia zaub mov "View-> Word Wrap".

npcNote-tip.value:
Sawv cev ntawm xaiv "tsis yog-ASCII" qhov chaw dawb thiab tsis luam tawm (tswj) cov cim.
CEEB TOOM: Kev siv tus sawv cev yuav cuam tshuam tus cwj pwm cuam tshuam ntawm cov ntawv.
Rau tag nrho cov npe ntawm qhov chaw dawb thiab cov cim uas tsis yog luam tawm kos tus neeg siv phau ntawv.
Nyem rau ntawm lub pob no txhawm rau qhib lub vev xaib nrog Cov Neeg Siv Khoom Siv.

npcAbbreviation-tip.value:
Abbreviation: npe NBSP: tsis muaj qhov chaw tawg ZWSP : zero-width space ZWNBSP : xoom-dav tsis muaj qhov chaw tawg
Rau daim ntawv teev tag nrho kos Tus Neeg Siv Phau Ntawv Qhia. Nyem rau "?"khawm ntawm sab xis qhib lub vev xaib nrog Cov Neeg Siv Phau Ntawv Qhia.

npcCodepoint-tip.value:
Codepoint: npe U+00A0: tsis muaj qhov chaw tawg U + 200B: zero-dav qhov chaw U + FEFF: xoom-dav tsis muaj qhov chaw tawg
Rau daim ntawv teev tag nrho kos Tus Neeg Siv Phau Ntawv Qhia. Nyem rau "?"khawm ntawm sab xis qhib lub vev xaib nrog Cov Neeg Siv Phau Ntawv Qhia.

npcCustomColor-tip.value: Mus rau Style Configurator los hloov lub neej ntawd kev cai xim rau xaiv whitespace thiab tsis-printing cim ("Non-printing cim kev cai xim").

npcIncludeCcUniEol-tip.value: Siv cov cim tsis-luam tawm cov teeb tsa rau C0, C1 tswj thiab Unicode EOL (kab tom ntej, kab cais thiab kab lus cais) cov cim.

searchingInSelThresh-tip.value: Yam tsawg kawg ntawm cov cim xaiv hauv thaj chaw kho kom raug kuaj xyuas "Nyob hauv kev xaiv" checkbox thaum nrhiav dialog qhib.Tus nqi siab tshaj plaws yog $INT_REPLACE$.Teem tus nqi rau 0 kom lov tes taw auto-checking.

searchingFillFindWhat-tip.value: Ntau tus naj npawb ntawm cov cim uas tau xaiv hauv thaj chaw kho kom raug sau cia li "Nrhiav dab tsi" teb thaum Ctrl-F tshwm sim.Tus nqi siab tshaj plaws yog $INT_REPLACE$, uas yog qhov loj tshaj plaws ntawm "Nrhiav dab tsi" teb, txwv los ntawm qhov system.

verticalEdge-tip.value: Ntxiv koj tus cim kab ke los ntawm kev qhia nws txoj haujlwm nrog tus lej lej.Koj tuaj yeem txhais ob peb kab cim los ntawm kev siv qhov chaw dawb cais cov lej sib txawv.

fileSaveAsCopySaveButton-tip.value: Tuav Shift thaum nias Txuag kom qhib daim ntawv luam tom qab txuag.

autoIndentBasic-tip.value: Xyuas kom meej tias qhov indentation ntawm cov kab tam sim no (piv txwv li cov kab tshiab tsim los ntawm nias tus yuam sij ENTER) sib tw rau qhov indentation ntawm kab dhau los.

autoIndentAdvanced-tip.value:
Pab kom ntse indentation rau "C-zoo li" hom lus thiab Python.Cov lus "C-zoo li" muaj xws li: C, C ++, Java, C#, Objective-C, PHP, JavaScript, JSP, CSS, Perl, Rust, PowerShell thiab JSON.
Yog tias koj xaiv hom qib siab tab sis tsis hloov cov ntaub ntawv hauv cov lus hais saum toj no, qhov indentation yuav nyob twj ywm hauv hom yooj yim.

global-override-tip.value: Enabling "Global override" ntawm no yuav override qhov parameter hauv txhua hom lus.Qhov koj xav tau tiag tiag yog siv qhov "Default Style" chaw hloov

scintillaRenderingTechnology-tip.value: Tej zaum yuav txhim kho kev ua haujlwm ntawm cov cim tshwj xeeb lossis daws qee qhov teeb meem duab, rov pib Notepad ++ kom siv cov kev hloov pauv.

toolbar-accent-tip.value: Qhov kev xaiv no ua rau koj lub cim icons ua raws li Windows system accent xim.Accent xim yog cov xim tseem ceeb uas siv hauv cov nyees khawm, ciam teb, thiab Pib cov ntawv qhia zaub mov hauv Windows.Txhawm rau hloov nws, mus rau Chaw> Tus Kheej> Xim, tom qab ntawd xaiv cov xim uas koj nyiam.

len-limit-exceeded-tip.value: Ntev ntev dhau lawm: Koj cov tswv yim tuaj yeem tshaj qhov txwv tau tso cai thiab tuaj yeem raug txiav, thiab nws yuav tsis raug cawm rau kev sib tham tom ntej.

max-len-on-search-tip.value: Koj cov tswv yim tuaj yeem dhau qhov txwv tau tso cai thiab tuaj yeem raug txiav, thiab nws yuav tsis raug cawm rau kev sib tham tom ntej.

max-len-on-save-tip.value: Qhov ntev ntawm koj cov tswv yim yog ntev heev thiab tej zaum yuav tsis tau txais kev cawmdim rau koj qhov kev sib tham tom ntej.

goto-setting-tip.value: Nrhiav koj qhov chaw ntawm no

tabbar-tabcompactlabellen-tip.value: Txwv qhov pom ntev ntawm cov npe ntev tab.Nkag mus siv tus nqi muab.Tus nqi ntau: 1-257 cim (0 disables lub truncation).
